title: isocarpha pyrethraria
intro: Isocarpha pyrethraria, also known as Devil's Trumpet or False Helenium, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Isocarpha pyrethraria include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
